data.name: 劉嬋養成計劃
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


三國時代群雄割據，各路英雄逐鹿中原，於計謀及戰爭的攻防戰中三國統帥都希望能夠一統天下，但在連綿戰火下，百姓盼望的和平盛世卻遲遲未實現，三國的紛爭也在漫長年歲中來到了後半場……

建安223年，病重的蜀漢皇帝劉備於臨終前將劉嬋託孤給我，讓我為繼承皇位的劉嬋扶助朝政，甚至還說可以在她無能的時候取代她……但身為他最忠心的軍師，我當然不可能這麼做，我真正希望的，是將劉嬋培養成百姓愛戴並且能獨當一面的皇帝，並讓蜀漢成為能夠統一天下的強大國家……這便是我此生最大的志願。

只是，一切都沒有想像中那麼容易，覬覦地位的養子、南中地區的叛亂、有反骨之相的將軍，以及曹魏的入侵，各種考驗在劉嬋上位後緊接而來……
內憂外患下，我究竟該怎麼做，才能帶領蜀漢迎向太平盛世，並培養劉嬋成為仁德聰慧的皇帝呢？

◆玩法


玩家將扮演扶持劉嬋皇帝的蜀漢丞相諸葛亮，在暗潮洶湧的亂世中培養劉嬋成為能夠一統天下的優秀皇帝，同時也得解決這個國家面臨的種種考驗。
在遊戲中每個月可以決定兩項國家政策，三項培養劉嬋的安排。政策決定會影響國家的數值，對於劉嬋的培養除了安排【學習】之外、也可以選擇【談話】、【出遊】、【休息】來讓劉嬋得到平衡的生活，並培養好感。每一個選擇與安排，都將影響著劉嬋與這個國家的命運。

◆遊戲特色


◇23張基本CG，4組動態CG，包含差分250張以上
◇經營養成類玩法
◇一位主要女角，三位次要女角
◇遊戲字數：十五萬字
◇遊戲結局：10種

◇遊戲結局：10種
data.short_description: 劉備駕崩後，身為蜀漢丞相諸葛亮的我除了要實現劉備天下太平的遺願，還要培養劉備託孤給我的女兒——劉嬋，讓她能夠成為獨當一面的蜀漢皇帝，但面對虎視眈眈且強大的曹魏，究竟要怎麼樣才能阻止敵國的侵略，同時還讓劉嬋走上安穩的帝王之路呢……
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 俄文, 日文*, 泰文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Liu Shan Maker
data.detailed_description:
◆ Story


During the Three Kingdoms era, warlords vied for supremacy, aspiring to unify the Central Plains through strategy and warfare. Yet, amidst the continuous conflict, the long-awaited era of peace and prosperity for the common people remained elusive. The chaos of the Three Kingdoms entered its latter stage after enduring years of incessant battles.

In the year 223 AD, on his deathbed, the ailing Emperor Liu Bei entrusted me with the care of his orphaned daughter, Liu Shan, to assist her in ruling and even suggested my intervention in case of her inability to lead. However, as his most loyal advisor, I could not entertain such thoughts. My true aspiration is to groom Liu Shan into a beloved and capable Empress, fostering Shu Han into a powerful nation capable of unifying the realm. This is my life's greatest ambition.

However, nothing unfolds as easily as envisioned. Ambitious stepsons eyeing power, rebellions in the southern regions, rebellious generals, and the invasion by Cao Wei posed successive challenges upon Liu Shan's ascension…

Amidst internal strife and external threats, what choices should I make to lead Shu Han toward an era of peace and prosperity while nurturing Liu Shan to become a wise and benevolent Empress?

◆ Gameplay


Players take on the role of Zhuge Liang, supporting Liu Shan's reign as the Chancellor of Shu Han, nurturing her into an exceptional Empress capable of unifying the realm during tumultuous times. They must navigate the challenges faced by the nation.

Each month in the game allows decisions on two national policies and three arrangements for Liu Shan's development. Policy decisions impact the nation's metrics while nurturing Liu Shan involves choices between "Studying," "Conversations," "Outings," and "Rest," enabling her to lead a balanced life and foster goodwill. Every decision and arrangement influences the destiny of Liu Shan and the nation.

◆ Game Features


◇ 23 basic CGs, including over 250 variations and 4 motion CGs
◇ Management and cultivation gameplay
◇ One main female character and three secondary female characters
◇ Word Count: 150,000 words
◇ Game Endings: 10 variations

data.short_description: After Liu Bei's passing, as Zhuge Liang, the Chancellor of Shu Han, not only do I aim to fulfill Liu Bei's wish for a peaceful empire, but I must also nurture Liu Bei's daughter, Liu Shan, entrusted to me as an orphan, to become an adept Empress of Shu Han...
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Russian, Japanese*, Thai, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 512 MB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
